creator: nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de
text:
I wanted to play with the sky feature and updated the port...

 I had to switch back the TARGET_DISTFILE to GoogleEarthLinux.bin tho,
the original way would download the old version for me even tho
it correctly used the new filename, no idea what google is
doing there. :)  (Oh and I had to install linux ff too to get the
download url as there was no linux download link on the homepage
and with native ff I was only offered a windows version...)

 Also I consistently get a crash on quit, but I can use it fine.

How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
